nasb.text: There were ninety-six exposed pomegranates; all the pomegranates numbered a hundred on the network all around.

esv.text: There were ninety-six pomegranates on the sides; all the pomegranates were a hundred upon the network all around.

cnv.text: 每個網子周圍共有一百個石榴，明顯可見的有九十六個。

ccb.text: 每根铜柱周围装饰着九十六个石榴，网子四周共有一百个石榴。
